findings.title: SQL injection in customer search endpoint
findings.description: The /api/customers search parameter is concatenated into a SQL query without parameterization, allowing injection and data exfiltration.

findings.title: TLS 1.0/1.1 enabled on load balancer
findings.description: The load balancer still negotiates deprecated TLS 1.0/1.1. A misconfiguration that weakens transport security.

findings.title: Server version banner disclosure
findings.description: The web server discloses its exact version in the Server header, aiding attacker fingerprinting.
